briefdescription.para: Declare a matrix with automatic (stack) storage.

memberdef.name: SYN_MAT_STATIC
memberdef.initializer: static q16_t name##_store[(R) * (C)]; \ static SYN_Matrix name = { name##_store, (R), (C) }

briefdescription.para: Declare a matrix with static storage (zero-initialized).
Initialize a matrix view over existing storage.
Element access (row, col) — evaluates to an lvalue.
Shorthand for 2×2.
Shorthand for 3×3.
Shorthand for 4×4.
Set matrix to identity.
Set all elements to zero.
Copy matrix contents.
Element-wise addition: out = A + B.
Element-wise subtraction: out = A − B.
Scalar multiply: out = A × scalar.
Matrix multiply: out = A × B.

detaileddescription.para: Requires: A.cols == B.rows, out is A.rows × B.cols. Uses int64_t accumulator for full Q16 precision.

parameterdescription.para: Result (R₁ × C₂). Must not alias a or b.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_Matrix *m, const q16_t *v_in, q16_t *v_out, uint8_t n_in)
memberdef.name: syn_matrix_mul_vec

briefdescription.para: Matrix–vector multiply: out = M × v.

parameterdescription.para: Output vector (R elements). Must not alias v_in.
Length of input vector (must equal m->cols).

briefdescription.para: Transpose: out = Aᵀ.

parameterdescription.para: Output (C × R). Must not alias a.

briefdescription.para: Trace (sum of diagonal elements).
Determinant of a square matrix.

detaileddescription.para: Supports 2×2, 3×3, and 4×4. Uses cofactor expansion for 2×2/3×3 and LU decomposition for 4×4.

briefdescription.para: Matrix inverse: out = M⁻¹.

detaileddescription.para: Supports 2×2, 3×3, and 4×4 square matrices. Returns SYN_ERROR if the matrix is singular (determinant ≈ 0).

parameterdescription.para: Output inverse (same dimensions). Must not alias m.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if singular.

briefdescription.para: Set 3×3 matrix to a 2D rotation.
Set 3×3 matrix to a 2D translation.
Set 3×3 matrix to a 2D scale.
Set 4×4 matrix to a rotation around the X axis.
Set 4×4 matrix to a rotation around the Y axis.
Set 4×4 matrix to a rotation around the Z axis.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Matrix *out, q16_t tx, q16_t ty, q16_t tz)
memberdef.name: syn_matrix_translate_3d

briefdescription.para: Set 4×4 matrix to a 3D translation.
Dot product of two n-element Q16 vectors.
Cross product of two 3-element Q16 vectors.

parameterdescription.para: Output vector (3 elements). Must not alias a or b.

briefdescription.para: Magnitude (Euclidean norm) of an n-element Q16 vector.
Normalize a vector to unit length.

parameterdescription.para: Output unit vector (n elements). May alias v.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if zero-length vector.

briefdescription.para: Solve general linear system A · x = b via LU decomposition.

detaileddescription.para: Uses Doolittle LU decomposition with partial pivoting (PA = LU). A must be a square N×N non-singular matrix. b and x must be N×1 vectors.

parameterdescription.para: Output solution vector (N×1). May alias b.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if A is singular or dimensions invalid.

briefdescription.para: Solve symmetric positive-definite system A · x = b via Cholesky.

detaileddescription.para: Decomposes A into L · Lᵀ where L is lower-triangular, then solves L · y = b and Lᵀ · x = y. Faster and more numerically stable than LU for symmetric positive-definite matrices (e.g. covariance or normal eqns).

parameterdescription.para: Output solution vector (N×1). May alias b.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if A is not positive-definite.

briefdescription.para: Solve overdetermined system A · x ≈ b via Normal Equations (Least Squares).

detaileddescription.para: Minimizes ||A·x − b||₂ for an M×N system (M ≥ N). Solves (Aᵀ · A) · x = Aᵀ · b using Cholesky or LU decomposition.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if AᵀA is singular.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_Matrix *src, uint8_t r0, uint8_t c0, SYN_Matrix *dst)
memberdef.name: syn_matrix_get_block

briefdescription.para: Extract a submatrix block from src into dst.

parameterdescription.para: Destination matrix (R×C). Must fit within src bounds from (r0, c0).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on out-of-bounds.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Matrix *dst, uint8_t r0, uint8_t c0, const SYN_Matrix *src)
memberdef.name: syn_matrix_set_block

briefdescription.para: Embed a submatrix block src into dst at position (r0, c0).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on out-of-bounds.

memberdef.argsstring: (const q16_t *u, uint8_t rows, const q16_t *v, uint8_t cols, SYN_Matrix *out)
memberdef.name: syn_matrix_outer_product

briefdescription.para: Vector outer product: out = u · vᵀ (rows(u) × cols(v)).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if NULL or invalid dimensions.

briefdescription.para: QR Decomposition: A = Q · R via Modified Gram-Schmidt process.

detaileddescription.para: Decomposes an M×N matrix A (M ≥ N) into orthogonal M×N matrix Q (QᵀQ = I) and upper-triangular N×N matrix R.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if A is linearly dependent / singular.

briefdescription.para: Compute eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a symmetric 2×2 matrix A.

parameterdescription.para: Output 2×2 matrix whose columns are the normalized eigenvectors.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on invalid inputs.

briefdescription.para: Compute eigenvalues and eigenvectors of a symmetric 3×3 matrix A via Jacobi rotations.

parameterdescription.para: Output 3×3 matrix whose columns are the normalized eigenvectors.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on invalid inputs.

briefdescription.para: Fixed-point Q16.16 matrix operations — zero heap allocation.

detaileddescription.para: Supports compile-time-arbitrary matrix dimensions. Callers supply all storage via stack or static arrays. The compiler constant-folds dimension parameters and unrolls loops when sizes are compile-time constants.
